title: hypericum pumilum subsp. pumilum
intro: Hypericum pumilum subsp. pumilum, also known as Dwarf St. John's Wort, is a low-growing, evergreen shrub native to the mountainous regions of Europe and Asia. This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Hypericum pumilum subsp. pumilum include its potential to reduce pain and inflammation, as well as its ability to aid in wound healing and skin issues. In herbal preparations, the plant's leaves and stems are typically dried and used to make teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to support the immune system and promote overall well-being.
